text.description: Caption or description text for the post

title.description: Optional title for the post (especially useful for travel posts)

trail.description: Reference to a trail record with route geometry

basePost.description: Reference to another post that this post is based on (e.g. a travel post based on an activity post)

activityType.description: Reference to an activityType record. If present, this is an activity post; if absent, it's a travel post

main.description: A post representing either an activity or a travel experience
